audit.priceRangeSummary: Pricing varies by speech model and add-on intelligence features. New accounts have commonly received ~$50 credits.
audit.limitsSummary: Docs cite rate/request ceilings (e.g., 20,000 requests per 5 minutes). Language and diarization coverage differs by feature. No public native TTS.
audit.regionSummary: AssemblyAI cloud; region controls more limited than hyperscalers.
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: 99 languages for Universal batch; fewer for some streaming/intelligence features.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Excellent STT + audio intelligence provider, but not a TTS provider. Keep summarization/analysis add-ons separate from core transcription in your schema.

supplementalResearch.title: 40. AssemblyAI (US) — STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 40. AssemblyAI (US) — STT ✓

**Status:** Active. STT-focused with LLM-powered audio intelligence.

`Universal-3 Pro` ($0.21/hr, 6 languages, prompt-based), `Universal-2` ($0.15/hr, 99 languages), `Slam-1` ($0.37/hr, highest accuracy). Streaming: U3 Pro $0.45/hr.

**LLM Gateway:** OpenAI-compatible endpoint routing to Claude, GPT, Gemini for audio analysis.

**Free tier:** $50 in credits. WebSocket streaming. EU endpoint available. SOC 2, HIPAA.

extractedBlocks.freeTier: $50 in credits. WebSocket streaming. EU endpoint available. SOC 2, HIPAA.
